title: Climate Home News
description: Climate change news, analysis, commentary, video and podcasts focused on developments in global climate politics

items.title: Iran war could boost fossil fuel phase-out push, says Colombian minister
items.description:

items.title: Can new CEO steer Global Center on Adaptation back on course?
items.description:

items.title: Early warning systems are saving lives in Central Asia
items.description:

items.title: Top green jet fuel producer linked to suspect waste-oil supply chain
items.description:

items.title: Middle East war is another wake-up call for fossil fuel-reliant food systems
items.description:

items.title: Will the EU finally make waste pay for its growing carbon footprint?
